summary: Preferred modern mobile/cross-platform ReactiveUI option using MAUI with platform-aware scheduler setup.
recommendedPatterns: Use MauiAppBuilder.UseReactiveUI with the ReactiveUI MAUI integration.
Keep scheduler boundaries explicit because MAUI platform dispatchers vary by target.
avoidPatterns: Do not generate legacy Xamarin.Forms guidance for new code.
Do not update UI-bound state from background tasks without marshaling back to the platform scheduler.
setupSteps: Initialize ReactiveUI through the MAUI app builder.
Use reactive MAUI page types or explicit IViewFor wiring.
commonPitfalls: Ignoring platform differences in scheduler setup.

harvest.sourceSummary: Curated from local ReactiveUI repositories, official GitHub documentation, and current SDK/package guidance.
harvest.notes: Prepared for the ReactiveUI MCP Server knowledge catalog.
